'''R'Ytha Myr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who may have in the past dated [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] (or perhaps another individual called "Ace"). Months before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], she sent an [[e-mail]] message to Ace Azzameen, saying that if he was the Ace she dated at [[Luxiar 7]], he should: "DROP DEAD, YOU LOUSE!"

She then added that he should disregard the message if he was not the right person.

{{Char-stub}}
